I love the bold, graphic pop of the black and red circles against the white faces, giving them such a cool, artistic vibe. It makes me wonder about their story or if I made them myself!

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I loved spotting this beautiful mallard duck today, gracefully gliding on the calm, greenish water! It was so peaceful watching it paddle along. In the background, I can see the tree-lined shore with some people enjoying the day, and what looks like a wooden walkway or dock extending out. The sunlight really brings out the textures on the water and the vibrant greens of the trees. It was a lovely moment taking in the lakeside scene and enjoying the presence of a bit of wildlife.

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I really love this expansive view from the dock! The deep blue water stretches out, shimmering beautifully under the bright, clear sky, with just a few fluffy white clouds drifting by. In the distance, I can make out the city skyline, a nice contrast to the lush green trees on the right bank, which look so vibrant in the sunshine. The old wooden dock in the foreground adds a rustic touch, inviting you to sit and just take it all in. It was such a peaceful moment, enjoying the blend of urban and natural landscapes.

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I stumbled upon this really interesting scene today! It's a striking view of this huge green truss bridge spanning across a calm river. What really caught my eye was all the construction happening around it – you can see cranes and what looks like new bridge supports being built, hinting at some big changes. In the foreground, there's this weathered warning sign attached to a tree, cautioning that it's not a boat ramp and that it's a hazardous condition, which definitely adds a bit of an edge to the peaceful riverside setting. I love how the lush green tree branches frame the shot, contrasting

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I just love looking up through the trees on a sunny day! This shot perfectly captures the vibrant green leaves, which look like maple or a similar shape, as they're beautifully backlit by the sun, creating such a brilliant glow. You can see the sunlight bursting through the canopy, giving off those wonderful sun rays and lens flare, while the tall, dark tree trunks reach up towards the clear sky. It felt so peaceful and refreshing to be immersed in nature, basking in the light and enjoying the beauty of the forest from this unique perspective.

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I loved walking along this quiet path today, winding through these beautiful tall trees! The sunlight was just incredible, filtering down through the leaves and branches, creating such a peaceful, dappled effect on the ground. You can really see how the light bursts through the canopy, highlighting the individual trunks and making the forest feel so inviting. It was such a serene moment, enjoying the fresh air and the natural beauty of the woods.

photos.caption: Grapes!
photos.captionKii: I absolutely loved this scenic view, capturing the expansive beauty of a vineyard under a beautiful sky! The rows of grapevines stretch out across the rolling landscape, their vibrant green leaves looking so fresh and healthy, supported by the sturdy wooden posts. You can see the distinct dirt path running alongside, inviting a stroll through the fields. In the distance, the landscape unfolds with more lush, green hills under a bright, partly cloudy sky, creating such a serene and picturesque setting. It felt wonderful to be out in nature, appreciating the agricultural beauty.

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I'm so pleased with how my garden is shaping up! This wider shot gives a great perspective of the different sections, with some of my plants already growing tall enough to need the red wire cages for support. You can see the distinct rows, nicely mulched with dark wood chips, and all the vibrant green growth pushing through. What's really cool is the contrast with the background—the bustling city skyline and the wooded hills peeking through the cloudy, overcast sky. It feels like my own little green oasis right on the edge of the urban landscape, and I love seeing everything thrive.

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I'm so thrilled to see my garden thriving! This overhead shot captures the early stages of growth, with the vibrant, spiky green leaves of what look like frisee or endive lettuce coming up beautifully in the foreground. Further back, I've got some young broccoli or cabbage plants with their distinct broad, round leaves taking root. The rich, dark soil is doing its job, and you can even spot some wood chip mulch along the bottom edge, where my brown boots are standing, making me feel right there, hands-on, with my sprouting veggies. It's incredibly rewarding to watch everything grow!

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweeping panoramic view, featuring a magnificent pine tree on the left, its branches reaching out against the expansive landscape. From this vantage point, I could see a wide valley unfolding below, with a tranquil river snaking its way through the lush, green fields and rolling hills in the distance. The sky was filled with soft, cloudy formations, creating a gentle, diffused light over everything. It felt so peaceful and vast, truly a breathtaking moment enjoying nature's grandeur.

photos.caption: Baby ducks visit the studio!
photos.captionKii: I captured this adorable trio of ducklings, all huddled together so sweetly in what looks like a cozy cardboard box. There's one fluffy light yellow little one nestled right in the middle, perfectly contrasting with the two darker, greyish-brown ducklings on either side. Their tiny, innocent faces and the way they're snuggled up instantly melt my heart. It's such a precious moment of new life and warmth.

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I came across this poignant memorial stone, beautifully set on a lush green lawn dotted with yellow dandelions, which instantly caught my eye. The inscription clearly dedicates it to Patrick Swayze, honoring his iconic role in 'Dirty Dancing' and his brave fight against pancreatic cancer. It even mentions the dedication date, November 21, 2009. Seeing the 'Dirty Dancing' title etched on the stone, along with the 'Mountain Lake' logo, was a real moment of connection, as I realized I was at the very location where parts of the movie were filmed. It was a touching tribute to an actor who left suc

photos.caption: upload
photos.captionKii: I really loved the look of this impressive stone building, standing grandly on a vibrant green hill under a dramatic, cloudy sky. The architecture, with its rustic stone walls, a beautiful red-tiled roof, and those distinctive tall, conical chimneys, gave it such a classic, old-world charm. It felt like stepping into a storybook or a historic retreat, especially with that lush lawn inviting you closer. I even spotted a white car parked near the entrance, adding a touch of modern life to this timeless scene.

photos.caption: Chris and Josh, bein' cute.
photos.captionKii: I captured this sweet, candid moment during a relaxed hangout, featuring two friends, both with impressive beards, leaning into each other. They're sitting comfortably in what looks like a cozy living room, bathed in natural light from the large window behind them. On the coffee table in the foreground, there's a distinctive textured decoration and a clear plastic cup with a straw, suggesting a laid-back afternoon. To the right, a guitar and a fedora are casually placed, adding to the warm, inviting atmosphere of the space. It’s such a genuine and affectionate display of friendship, a lovely m

photos.caption: Driftwood structure
photos.captionKii: I stumbled upon this impressive structure built entirely from driftwood and logs on a very rocky stretch of beach. It looked like a natural fort or a large piece of art created by the ocean itself, standing tall against the backdrop of the waves crashing gently in the distance. The sky above was a beautiful clear blue with wisps of white clouds, creating a serene and expansive feeling. I loved seeing all the different textures of the weathered wood and the pebbles underfoot, really capturing the rugged, wild beauty of this coastal area I was exploring.

photos.caption: Lovely forest path
photos.captionKii: I stepped into this beautiful, serene forest, feeling completely immersed in nature. The towering, slender trees, mostly conifers, reached straight up towards the sky, creating a canopy that filtered the light into a soft, gentle glow. The forest floor was a vibrant tapestry of lush green ferns and various undergrowth, making everything feel incredibly alive. A quiet path wound its way through the middle, inviting further exploration. It was such a peaceful moment, truly capturing the tranquil beauty of being surrounded by so much greenery.

photos.caption: Unearthed tree
photos.captionKii: I captured this really striking and atmospheric scene during what felt like a truly immersive coastal experience. The foreground is dominated by these incredible, gnarled reddish-brown tree roots, exposed and reaching across the wet, sandy beach, almost like natural sculptures. There's a mix of pebbles and dark rocks around them, showing the raw nature of the coastline. Further out, the beach disappears into a mysterious mist or fog that clings to the base of the forested hills in the distance. A distinct, conical sea stack rises out of the water, partially shrouded in the haze, adding to the

photos.caption: new masks
photos.captionKii: I really liked this overhead shot, showcasing more of my sculptural masks arranged in a weathered metal bowl, possibly while I was still working on them or just appreciating their arrangement in my creative space. There are five dark, mysterious faces, each with a distinct stripe—three bold red, one stark black, and one striking cream stripe running down the middle. I love how the raw concrete floor with its splatters and the surrounding paint cans hint at the hands-on process and the creative environment. My feet, in dark shoes, peeking into the bottom of the frame, give a sense of my presenc

I found these really striking dark sculptural masks, possibly made of clay, displayed together on a light-colored surface. There are four of them, each with subtle differences in expression and form. What really caught my eye were the strips across some of their eyes – one has a bright red strip, while others have dark, almost black, strips. They have a mysterious and contemplative feel to them, almost like they're part of an art installation or a creative project. I loved how they were arranged, creating such an intriguing visual.

I captured this moody shot of the city at night, which always holds a unique kind of beauty. The dark sky is dramatically lit by the prominent orange glow of a streetlight, contrasting with the more distant and scattered lights of the city buildings across the horizon. You can see the road curving in the foreground, with the faint lights of a vehicle moving away, giving a sense of quiet transit. The overall atmosphere is quite serene and a bit mysterious, highlighting the urban landscape after everyone's settled in for the evening.

I loved capturing this cozy Hanukkah moment at home. The room was bathed in the warm, soft glow of the lit menorahs, with all those beautiful candles illuminating the space. There are at least two menorahs, one of them quite decorative, and the light reflects beautifully off the bright yellow wall. I particularly enjoyed how the light brought out the details in the children's drawings hanging above – they add such a personal touch to the celebration. To the left, the window with its sheer curtains and the festive plant with little red ornaments really completed the inviting holiday atmosphere.

photos.caption: Drinking beers out of mason jars. Only in portland.
photos.captionKii: I took this shot while we were out at a dimly lit bar, enjoying the festive atmosphere. You can see a man, with his dark, curly hair, taking a sip from his glass, which looks like it's filled with beer. The whole place was decorated with warm, red string lights and a bright red star ornament, giving it such a cozy and pre-holiday vibe. It was a nice change of pace and a good night out.

photos.caption:
2012

Earthenware clay, press mould, underglaze and glazes

13cm x 8cm
photos.captionKii: I wanted to take another really close-up and focused shot of one of my finished clay masks to highlight its unique features. This dark, almost black, mask with its matte texture really makes those glossy, reflective black eyes stand out, giving it a captivating intensity. The distinct cracks running across its forehead and vertically down its face are quite pronounced, and I think they add a lot to its character and history. The plain, light background helps isolate the mask, allowing all its details and the effort I put into it to be the main focus.

photos.caption:
2012

Earthenware clay, press mould, underglaze and glazes

13cm x 8cm
photos.captionKii: I wanted to capture a detailed shot of one of my clay masks, especially after it had dried a bit more. This dark, almost black, mask has really developed its own personality, with those deep, glossy black eyes that seem to just stare out. The crack running across the forehead and down the side has become more pronounced, which I think adds to its unique character rather than detracting from it. It's fascinating to see how each piece evolves, and I'm really happy with how the texture and the reflective quality of the eyes contrast with the matte clay.

I was walking through an urban area and just had to look up and capture the imposing architecture of this concrete overpass. The way the two massive structures converged upwards, almost mirroring each other, was incredibly striking. I loved the powerful sense of geometry and repetition created by the many beams and supports, especially with the bright sky almost blowing out the top, emphasizing the sheer scale. Standing beneath it, you really get a sense of the immense construction and engineering involved, a kind of modern, raw beauty in the concrete.

I was still deeply engrossed in my clay sculpture work in the studio, and I took this shot from my perspective looking down. You can see my dark blue pants and sneakers, positioned right under the pottery wheel, giving a real sense of being physically present and involved. On the well-used, almost grimy surface of the wheel, two of the clay masks I've been shaping are clearly visible. The one in the center has a distinct horizontal line across its face, and another can be seen peeking out towards the upper left. It really captures the hands-on, focused energy of working with clay.

photos.caption: Studio time.
photos.captionKii: I was in the studio, taking a moment to appreciate the progress on these three clay masks I've been working on. They're all laid out on a pottery wheel, and you can see their individual features starting to come to life, even though they're still in the raw, unfired stage. The one in the foreground has developed some natural cracks, which sometimes happens as the clay dries, but I think it adds to its character. In the background, you can spot some of the other equipment and supplies, like a plastic-covered piece and tools, giving a real sense of the creative workspace.

I was really enjoying the cozy atmosphere created by these decorative lanterns in the room. I had them laid out on a textured mat or rug, and the way the four different colors—a bright blue, a warm orange, a vibrant pink-red, and a darker red one with a more intricate, almost floral-like pattern—cast their glow was so inviting. You can see the wires running between them, which adds to the casual, lived-in feel. I thought the soft, dim lighting and the square crop really captured the ambiance I was going for that evening.

I spotted this billboard on the side of a building under a cloudy sky, and it immediately caught my eye. It was a bright red background with the bold statement 'I'm SECULAR AND I VOTE.' in big white letters, next to a smiling portrait of an older woman. Below her picture, it identified her as 'Caroline Miller, novelist, Portland,' and linked back to the 'Freedom From Religion Foundation' at ffrf.org. I thought it was a powerful and clear message, especially with the general election having just passed, and wanted to capture it. There were a couple of cars parked in front of the building, a dar

photos.caption: Blush
photos.captionKii: I was walking down the street and stopped to admire this incredible burst of fall color. This particular bush or small tree was just magnificent, with its leaves transitioning from a brilliant golden yellow at the top to a fiery, rich red towards the bottom. It felt like a true explosion of autumn, especially with the soft light of the day bringing out all those warm tones. Seeing it against the backdrop of a quiet residential street, with just a hint of a house and fence, made it feel so perfectly in tune with November.

I looked up again, captivated by the vibrant autumn light filtering through the trees. The golden-orange leaves on the branches overhead were absolutely glowing against the dramatic, cloudy sky, especially with the sun bursting through and creating that beautiful lens flare. It felt like such a quintessential November moment, and I loved how the square crop and a subtle filter made the colors pop and gave it a really artistic vibe, even with just a glimpse of a reddish rooftop in the bottom corner.

I couldn't get enough of the autumn spectacle, so I looked up again to capture this vibrant view. The maple trees were absolutely ablaze with brilliant golden-yellow leaves, creating a stunning contrast against the crisp, deep blue sky dotted with fluffy white clouds. The way the sunlight filtered through them made them glow, almost like stained glass. I used a filter on my phone to really enhance those warm tones and the square crop makes it feel almost like a painting. It was such a perfect November day.

I looked up and was completely enveloped by the vibrant spectacle of these autumn leaves, a true canopy of gold and orange against the crisp blue sky. The intricate network of dark branches formed such a beautiful contrast with the bright foliage. It felt like walking through a tunnel of color, and I just had to capture that overhead view, feeling the full splendor of November.

photos.caption: Loving the autumn.
photos.captionKii: I was struck by the incredible beauty of this tree, ablaze with vibrant autumn colors. Its leaves were a fiery mix of deep reds and bright oranges, really popping against the more muted greens of the background trees. The ground below was already covered with a carpet of fallen leaves, and the street looked a bit wet, suggesting it had recently rained or was still damp. There's a silver car parked subtly on the side, adding a touch of everyday life to this stunning natural display. It perfectly captured the feeling of November.

I captured another one of my sculpted masks, this time experimenting with a sleek, dark aesthetic. The matte black surface of the face has subtle, deliberate lines etched into it, creating a segmented or fractured appearance. What really stands out are the eyes, which I filled with a glossy, almost liquid-like dark material, giving the mask a mysterious, 'shades'-wearing look. The left eye is quite smooth and reflective, while the right one has a more textured, slightly bubbly finish, adding a bit of asymmetry. It's resting on a piece of light-colored, textured wood, which I often use as a bac

I captured another one of my mask creations, this one with a particularly striking, almost eerie, quality. The matte black surface of the face is intentionally fractured, with delicate cracks spreading across it, giving it a sense of age or distress. What really stands out is the right eye socket, which I designed to look completely broken, almost shattered, revealing a deep, dark, and irregularly textured void within. It almost looks like molten glass or a jagged tear, adding a dramatic, almost haunting depth. The mask is resting on a light wooden background, possibly a piece of textured plyw

I was really captivated by this old, weathered carriage I came across. The bright, almost faded red of its wooden spoke wheels immediately caught my eye, contrasting beautifully with the dark, chipped paint of the carriage body. You can see how much character it had, with the paint peeling in places, hinting at its long history. It looked like it was resting outdoors, maybe in a lot or alley, with some green tarp peeking out from underneath the frame. I loved the rustic, antique vibe of the whole scene; it felt like a snapshot from another era.

photos.caption: Sliver of sunset.
photos.captionKii: I captured this moment as the day was ending, looking up at the dramatic urban sky. The sunset was just incredible, painting the sky in a beautiful gradient from a deep, dusky purple at the top, fading into a vibrant orange and yellow near the horizon. Everything below was silhouetted against this light, with the heavy structure of a highway overpass cutting diagonally across the frame. I could also see the distinct outline of a building with the 'PORTLAND STORAGE CO.' sign faintly visible, reminding me exactly where I was. A lone street light stood tall, almost like a sentinel, between the br

photos.caption: Glazing tests
photos.captionKii: I remember working on these intriguing mask forms, experimenting with different textures and expressions. These dark, almost black, clay-like faces were so interesting to sculpt. I was playing around with adding these stark white elements, like the curved shape draped over one eye and cheek on the top mask, and the bold 'X' over the eyes of the bottom one. The white really contrasted with the dark base, giving them a distinct look. They were resting on this textured, round work board, probably a pottery wheel or a dedicated crafting surface, with some of my supplies like small jars in the back

photos.caption: Boozy bingo
photos.captionKii: I remember this fun evening, settling in for a game of Bingo! This shot captures my Bingo card, laid out on a warm, reflective wooden table. Some of the numbers were already marked, showing how into the game I was. In the background, I can just make out a glass with a dark drink, probably a beer, glinting in the soft, ambient light. The whole scene had such a cozy, inviting glow, making it a perfect casual night out.

photos.caption: Sunset speed scrabble
photos.captionKii: After a wonderful day by the ocean, it was so nice to wind down with a puzzle as the sun began to set. I loved how the warm, golden light streamed through the window, silhouetting us and making the whole room feel so cozy. From our table, we still had that incredible view of the vast ocean, which was just stunning as it reflected the last rays of daylight. My friend, with his beard and green shirt, was really focused, and I was deep in thought too, searching for the right pieces to fit. We had our drinks, probably some beers, and a snack on the table, making for a perfectly relaxed evening rig

I loved this view from what felt like the edge of the world! The deep blue ocean stretched out endlessly, meeting a clear sky on the horizon. Those rugged rocky islands rising from the water looked so dramatic in the distance, perfectly framed by the clear blue sky. In the foreground, there was this simple, charming fence made of white posts and thick rope, marking the edge of the cliff where I was standing. I could even see the waves crashing against the base of the cliff below. It was such a breathtaking and peaceful coastal scene, really making me appreciate the beauty of nature.

I loved this peaceful moment, captured from my perspective as I relaxed on the sandy beach. My feet, sun-kissed and covered in sand, were propped up in the foreground, giving such a laid-back vibe to the shot. Beyond my toes, the vast expanse of the beach stretched out towards the serene ocean, where gentle waves rolled in. The sky was a beautiful clear blue, meeting the horizon in the distance. I could even spot a lone figure enjoying the water further down the beach. The whole scene felt so calm and refreshing, and I remember just soaking it all in.

photos.caption: Tiny sustainable slum-city model
photos.captionKii: I was really captivated by this intricate architectural model, which looked like a multi-story house or building. The attention to detail was amazing, with the outer walls having this textured, stone or brick-like appearance, while other sections showed smooth, light-colored panels. I loved the way the different levels were designed, complete with windows and what looked like a small balcony with a lovely lattice railing. There was even a narrow, white ladder connecting the floors, adding to the realism of this miniature world. It felt like I was peering into a meticulously crafted piece, and

photos.caption: All aboard the sushi train.
photos.captionKii: I loved this vibrant snapshot from a sushi restaurant, probably a kaiten-zushi place! The red counter was such a striking color, making the conveyor belt of deliciousness really pop. Each little plate of sushi was perfectly covered with its own clear dome, waiting to be picked up. I could see a variety of rolls and nigiri making their way around. In the background, there's a classic Maneki-neko, the waving lucky cat, adding to the authentic Japanese vibe, along with stacks of glasses behind the counter. It was so much fun watching all the different dishes go by and deciding what to grab next.

photos.caption: Oregon Symphony on the waterfront with full moon rising
photos.captionKii: I captured this beautiful scene as the sun was setting, creating a lovely gradient of peach and blue across the sky. The iconic bridge stretched across the water in the middle ground, and below it, the water was dotted with numerous boats, some docked, others cruising, making for a lively atmosphere on the bay. I could even spot the faint glow of the moon peeking out on the left side of the sky. In the foreground, there were silhouettes of people, suggesting a crowd gathered to watch the evening unfold or perhaps an event taking place. The whole moment felt so peaceful and picturesque, and I l

photos.caption: Sunday Parkways bike festival
photos.captionKii: I was walking through what looked like a really fun community event, possibly a bike race or a festival in a park. The paved path was absolutely lined with bicycles of all kinds, neatly parked one after another under the shade of those big, leafy trees, creating quite a vibrant scene. There were so many people milling about in the background, and I could spot some tents, hinting at stalls or gathering points. A little blonde-haired boy in a blue shirt was walking ahead on the path, seemingly absorbed in the excitement. The atmosphere felt really lively and energetic, and I loved seeing everyon

I spotted this sign and just had to capture it – it perfectly encapsulates a certain kind of humor! It's a dark sign with bold, gold lettering that proudly declares 'NATIONAL SARCASM SOCIETY.' Below that, there's a little crest with what looks like a donkey and the phrase 'S. Proclaim Smart Asses,' which made me chuckle. But the best part is the tagline at the very bottom: 'LIKE WE NEED YOUR SUPPORT.' It's so brilliantly sarcastic and self-aware, and I immediately appreciated the wit. It was such an amusing and unexpected find, definitely brightened up the day!

photos.caption: Trade in your Zirkels
photos.captionKii: I really liked the vibe of this street scene, possibly while exploring a new area or just enjoying a walk downtown. The 'ZIRKEL TRADING' sign, with its bold red font, really caught my eye against the warm brick building. There's another smaller, more intricate sign for 'URBANE' just below it, which suggests a nice mix of shops in this area. I also appreciate the classic design of the old-fashioned street lamp standing tall on the left, adding a timeless touch to the foreground. In the distance, you can see the rolling green, tree-covered hills, hinting at a beautiful natural landscape beyond t

photos.caption: Village smithy
photos.captionKii: I found this really cool old building, which immediately struck me with its rustic charm. The weathered wooden planks and peeling grey paint tell a story of time passing, giving it such a unique character. Right above the large double doors, you can still clearly read 'N HOARE' and underneath, 'VILLAGE SMITHY,' which is just fantastic – it must have been an old blacksmith's shop! The red trim around the doors and the window adds a nice touch of color against the muted tones of the wood. I love how the window reflects the sky and some distant buildings, giving a subtle glimpse of the surroundin

photos.caption: Separating the curds and whey
photos.captionKii: Here's an update on my cheese-making adventure! After mixing everything, it was time for the crucial straining step. I've got the cheese curds hanging in a cheesecloth bag from the kitchen faucet, slowly draining into the sink below. You can see the liquid dripping out, and it's exciting to think this is how the homemade Paneer or Queso Blanco starts to take shape. This waiting part feels a bit like magic, watching the whey separate and the cheese firm up.

photos.caption: Making cheese today
photos.captionKii: I was so excited to get my hands on this DIY cheese kit! It's for making Paneer and Queso Blanco, and the label says it makes 10 batches, which is fantastic. I also got the special pure cheese salt that goes with it. I'm really looking forward to trying out some homemade cheese, it feels like a fun new project to dive into in the kitchen. It's all laid out on the counter, ready for me to start my cheese-making adventure!

I stumbled upon this incredibly vibrant and charming mural, which immediately caught my eye with its whimsical, somewhat retro style. It depicts such a lively scene, with two old-fashioned vehicles, one a truck filled with beautiful red flowers, and another carrying flowers in its bed, almost looking like a flower delivery or market scene. A happy brown dog with its tongue out is trotting along on a leash, adding to the cheerful atmosphere. In the background, you can see the legs of a person walking, a white picket fence, and some elegant rose bushes. The colors are so rich and inviting, and t

photos.caption: What happened here!?
photos.captionKii: I came across another fascinating view of one of these abandoned wooden structures, which really highlights how nature is reclaiming them. This particular section looks even more derelict, with its walls visibly caving in and pieces of wood askew. What's striking is how a massive, gnarled tree on the left, along with another tree in the center, seem to be growing right into and around the remains of the building, almost holding it in place or slowly tearing it apart. The entire scene is enveloped by dense green foliage and trees, emphasizing its secluded and overgrown nature. It feels like a h

photos.caption: Abandoned
photos.captionKii: I came across this really intriguing old wooden structure, which felt like a hidden find in an overgrown area. The rustic, weathered wood has such character, especially with all the graffiti and markings etched into it – I spotted a heart and a peace sign among them, adding to its mysterious charm. There are these old, moss-covered wooden stairs leading up, which makes me wonder what's beyond the doorway. Lush green foliage and trees are spilling in from the right, making it feel like nature is slowly reclaiming this space. It has a very raw and organic feel, almost like stumbling upon a secre

photos.caption: I deem that it is time to boogy.
photos.captionKii: I captured this really striking profile shot of a friend, looking out contemplatively as the sun was setting. The golden light from the low sun is absolutely stunning, bathing his face in a warm glow and creating beautiful rays of light and a lens flare on the right side of the frame. You can see the rooftops of buildings in the background, which adds to the urban, elevated feel of the scene, just like the other views we were enjoying. His curly hair and beard are really highlighted by the backlight, and he just looks so immersed in the moment, taking in the beautiful end to the day.

I captured this really lovely moment of a musician playing his acoustic guitar, adding such a wonderful ambiance to the evening. He's sitting on a chair on what looks like an outdoor terrace or rooftop, with a microphone stand beside him. In the background, you can see the expansive view of a body of water, likely a bay, with distant land and a hint of the city skyline, all under a vast, pale sky. The warm, golden light of the setting sun is casting long shadows and highlighting the scene, making it feel so peaceful and atmospheric. It was such a perfect accompaniment to taking in the beautifu

I was treated to such a beautiful view of the city as the sun was setting! From this elevated perspective, I could see layers of residential buildings with their varying architectural styles cascading down the hillside. Beyond the rooftops, there's a shimmering body of water, likely a bay, stretching out to distant land visible on the horizon. The sky is gorgeous, with soft clouds catching the warm, golden light of the setting sun, which is casting a lovely sunbeam or lens flare on the left side of the frame. It was such a peaceful moment, just taking in this expansive urban landscape bathed i

photos.caption: Strawberry pickin'
photos.captionKii: I absolutely loved spending the day out in this expansive strawberry field! The rows of vibrant green strawberry plants stretch so far into the distance under such a beautiful, partly cloudy blue sky. You can spot a few other people scattered throughout the field, all bent over and busy, likely picking their own fresh berries – some even have their buckets visible. It was such a peaceful and rewarding experience, being out in nature and gathering delicious fruit. The distant trees and subtle hills in the background just add to the serene, pastoral feel of the whole scene.

What an incredible sunset to end a perfect day at the beach! I captured this wide shot of the horizon as the sun dipped below the ocean. The sky is a gradient of deep blues at the top, fading into soft purples, and then bursting into fiery oranges and yellows right where the sun is setting. There are even some wispy pink clouds adding to the drama. The ocean waves are gently rolling in, reflecting the last vibrant light, and the wet sand on the shore glows with that golden hue. It truly felt like a magical moment, just soaking in the peaceful atmosphere as the day drew to a close.

I was absolutely delighted to discover this charming little waterfall cascading down during my coastal adventure! The water flows so gracefully over what looks like a natural rock formation, tumbling into a shallow stream bed that's covered in dark, smooth pebbles and larger stones. In the background, you can see the earthy, slightly overgrown bank rising up, hinting at the lushness beyond. It felt like such a peaceful, hidden gem, and I loved the sound of the water against the quiet natural surroundings. I just had to capture this serene moment, a beautiful contrast to the expansive beach.

I absolutely love this view of the expansive beach, with its soft, seemingly endless sand stretching out towards the ocean. In the distance, there's this incredible, massive rock formation standing tall out in the water, looking so majestic, flanked by a few smaller, jagged rocks. You can just barely make out the lines of waves gently rolling onto the shore, and there are a few people dotted along the beach, enjoying the day. The sky is a beautiful clear blue, fading slightly to a lighter hue towards the horizon, and there's even a little bird soaring overhead in the upper left corner. The who

photos.caption: Struttin'
photos.captionKii: This shot captures a casual moment of a man walking down a tree-lined residential street on what looks like a beautiful, sunny day. He's got a relaxed stride, wearing a red long-sleeved shirt, beige pants, and a shoulder bag, and he's got a full beard. The street is quiet, flanked by lush green trees, creating a lovely canopy overhead, with houses peeking out in the background and a car parked on the side. The light is casting some nice shadows on the pavement. It feels like a laid-back afternoon stroll, just enjoying the neighborhood ambiance.

photos.caption: Lens flare
photos.captionKii: I just love how bright and dynamic the sky looked on this day! I snapped this shot looking straight up, capturing the brilliant sun directly overhead, creating this awesome lens flare and beaming down through the scattered white clouds. Below, you can see the outline of a tall building, possibly under construction or renovation, silhouetted against the bright sky, along with some power lines and other urban structures. It really gives a sense of a sunny, bustling day from my perspective on the street.

photos.caption: :D
photos.captionKii: Here are my two friends taking a moment to pause on a narrow dirt trail during our mountain hike. The guy on the left, with the bandana, is looking down at something in his hands, perhaps checking a map or a device, while my other friend, on the right, is looking directly at me with a smile, his backpack ready for more trekking. We were really immersed in the rugged beauty of the mountains, with rocky slopes, patches of vibrant green grass, and pops of yellow wildflowers lining the path. Higher up, you can still see patches of snow clinging to the peaks. It was such a beautiful, sunny day, abs

photos.caption: Mountain frizbee
photos.captionKii: Here's another fun moment from our mountain adventure! This shot perfectly captures my friend in mid-action, expertly throwing the orange frisbee across the rugged, rocky terrain. We were surrounded by these beautiful, rolling hills, covered in low, dry bushes, with a larger mountain slope rising in the background to the left. The sky was so vibrant with those big, fluffy white clouds against a bright blue, making it an ideal day for some outdoor fun and games. It was great to just enjoy the stunning views and play around in such an open, natural space.

This shot captures a beautiful, rugged view of the mountains we were exploring. The landscape here is so wild, with massive grey rock formations dominating the scene, and higher up, you can still see patches of lingering snow. In the foreground, there's a mix of dry, reddish-brown grasses and some small pools of water, reflecting the clear blue sky with its scattered white clouds. It really shows the diverse and raw beauty of the terrain we were hiking through, a perfect moment to take in the grandeur of nature.

Here's a great shot of my friend taking a well-deserved break during our mountain adventure. He's sitting comfortably on a large rock, with his feet dipped into a small, clear pool of mountain water, enjoying a refreshing drink from a bottle. The rugged landscape around him is so beautiful, with patches of snow still lingering, dry reddish-brown grasses, and plenty of grey rocks. The sun was shining brightly, making it a perfect moment to relax and cool off in the midst of our exploration.

This captures another moment from our mountain exploration, with my friend getting ready to throw the frisbee in the rugged landscape! The ground was a mix of large grey rocks, patches of bright white snow, and dry, reddish-brown shrubs. My blue backpack is resting on a rock in the foreground, indicating we were out exploring. It was such a fun and active day, enjoying games in this beautiful, wild setting under a clear sky with fluffy clouds.

This is another shot from our mountain adventure, capturing a fun moment as my friend dashed across a patch of snow, frisbee in hand! The terrain was so varied, with big rocks scattered everywhere, patches of lingering snow, and those reddish-brown dry grasses adding to the wild feel. Above, the sky was a vibrant blue with fluffy white clouds, making the perfect backdrop for our outdoor fun. It really captures the energy of our exploration and how we made the most of the diverse landscape, even playing in the snow!

Here's a cool shot of my friend playing frisbee up in the mountains! The sun was out, and the sky was a perfect blue with fluffy white clouds, making for a beautiful backdrop. You can see the rugged landscape all around us, with those big rocks and patches of snow still lingering from winter. It was such a fun, active day, taking a break from hiking to enjoy a game in this incredible natural setting. My backpack is right there on the rocks, ready for the next part of our adventure.

I loved this view of the calm mountain lake, perfectly mirroring the bright blue sky above. The rugged landscape around it was so striking, with huge grey rock formations and patches of dry, reddish-brown grasses and low shrubs clinging to the slopes. You can still see hints of snow higher up on the mountains, which added to the sense of wildness and natural beauty. It was such a tranquil spot, a beautiful reward during our exploration of the mountains.

I stumbled upon this incredibly peaceful mountain lake, its calm waters perfectly reflecting the brilliant blue sky and the rugged peaks around it. The surrounding landscape was a mix of grey, rocky slopes, still dotted with patches of snow higher up, and scattered dry grass and low-growing reddish plants closer to the water's edge. It felt like such a serene and untouched spot, a beautiful reward after hiking through the mountainous terrain. The clear reflections in the water were just mesmerizing, truly capturing the vastness and quiet beauty of this place.

Looking up this rocky, winding trail, I could feel the immense scale of the mountain we were climbing. The path was a mix of large boulders and smaller stones, with resilient patches of dry grass and low-lying green bushes clinging to the rugged slopes. Far in the distance, I could just make out two figures, likely my friends, making their way further up the ascent. Above us, the sky was a brilliant, cloudless blue, with the faint white line of a contrail stretching across, adding a touch of human presence to the otherwise wild and natural landscape.

I captured this shot of my friend taking a moment to pause on the mountain trail. He's got his full beard, wearing a green t-shirt, dark capri pants, and that distinctive purple patterned beanie. With his backpack on, he's looking out towards the right, perhaps taking in the expansive view or just catching his breath. Behind him, the stunning mountain scenery unfolds, with lush green slopes giving way to even higher, snow-capped peaks in the distance, all under a bright, clear sky. It really captures the essence of our hike that day, feeling the vastness of nature all around us.

I captured this moment of my friend, with his full beard and a purple bandana, smiling at me as he walked up the steep, rocky trail. He had his backpack on, ready for the adventure, and behind him, the mountain sloped dramatically down into a lush, green valley filled with dense trees. The elevation offered such an incredible view of the sprawling landscape, reminding us of how high we'd climbed and the beautiful nature surrounding us on this clear day.

I was completely enveloped by the grandeur of this mountain landscape, stretching out under a bright blue sky with a few wispy clouds and even some faint contrails. In the foreground, the rugged slopes were dotted with sparse green brush and rocky patches, leading my eye down into a rich, verdant valley filled with dense, vibrant green trees. Beyond this lush forest, majestic mountains rose, their peaks still holding onto significant patches of pristine white snow. The contrast between the deep greens of the valley and the bright white snow against the blue sky was absolutely breathtaking, mak

I captured this moment of my friends hiking along a rocky, stone-paved trail, surrounded by the beautiful green and rocky mountain slopes. The guy on the left, wearing a white t-shirt and dark shorts with a backpack, is looking to the side, while the other, in a green t-shirt, dark shorts, and a patterned bandana, is facing up the path, with his backpack on, taking in the view ahead. It was a bright, sunny day perfect for trekking, and the path looked well-trodden, winding its way up the verdant terrain. It felt great to be out in nature, exploring these scenic trails.

I was completely captivated by this breathtaking mountain vista under a brilliant blue sky, dotted with fluffy white clouds. In the foreground, vibrant green trees and a grassy slope led my eye towards the majestic peaks in the distance, which were still capped with patches of snow. It was such a fresh, clear day, and I loved seeing the mix of lush greenery transitioning up to the rugged, snow-dusted mountains. The whole scene felt incredibly serene and expansive, truly making me feel connected to nature.

photos.caption: walking the wall
photos.captionKii: I captured this striking view from within the massive stone walls of the castle, looking down a long, winding pathway. The immense scale of the fortifications was truly impressive, with towering stone structures rising on both sides. On the left, a series of impressive conical-roofed turrets, some dark grey and others with reddish-orange tops, stood majestically against the bright blue sky. Further down on the right, another distinct rounded tower with a dark pointed roof added to the ancient atmosphere. I loved seeing other visitors exploring the grounds, walking along a grassy path by the wa

photos.caption: view from the top
photos.captionKii: I captured this amazing panoramic view from the castle walls, looking out over the sprawling town below. The pointed dark slate roof of one of the castle's prominent towers stands sharply on the left, contrasting beautifully with the bright blue sky and the distant horizon. Beyond the ancient stone parapet, I could see countless reddish-orange tiled roofs of the houses clustered together, interspersed with green trees. It was such a clear, sunny day, giving me an incredible sense of the scale and history of this place, extending far into the distance, almost like a painting.

I loved this elevated view of the historic town, looking out over a sea of beautiful terracotta-tiled roofs. It was such a sunny day, and the blue sky with fluffy white clouds created a perfect backdrop for the ancient buildings below. In the distance, I could clearly see another grand, imposing stone structure with its distinctive towers and walls, which really highlighted the rich history all around me. I felt like I was getting such a complete picture of this incredible medieval setting, seeing not just the castle itself but also the charming village that grew around it.

I captured another breathtaking view from within the castle walls, looking across a sunlit courtyard surrounded by impressive stone structures. The deep blue sky provided a perfect backdrop for the ancient stonework, and I loved how the different sections of the fortress connected. In the foreground, I could see a sturdy stone wall with a covered wooden walkway, while a majestic round tower with its distinct pointed slate roof stood tall against the horizon. Further back, more castle roofs with their reddish-orange tiles peeked out, creating a sense of the vastness of this historic site. It wa

photos.caption: who goes there?
photos.captionKii: I zoomed in to capture the incredible detail of this heavy, studded metal door within the castle. The deep, reddish-brown tones of the rusted iron, along with the numerous rivets, gave it such a formidable and ancient feel. I was particularly drawn to the small, square barred window set into the center, hinting at the secure, perhaps even mysterious, rooms within. It was fascinating to see these close-up elements of medieval engineering and imagine the stories this door could tell.

I was absolutely captivated by the sheer scale and intricate details of this ancient stone fortress. The massive, textured walls, with their weathered stones, rose impressively against a brilliant blue sky, making it feel like I had stepped back in time. I particularly admired the robust wooden galleries and balconies that jutted out from the walls, connecting the sturdy round towers with their pointed slate roofs. It was such a perfect day for exploring, and I found myself soaking in the history and incredible craftsmanship of this medieval masterpiece.

I caught my bearded friend in a hilarious, over-the-top moment, completely hamming it up with goggles on and holding what looks like a remote control in one hand and a hairbrush in the other! He was sitting on the floor, mouth wide open in a laugh or a shout, full of energy and silliness. The bookshelves filled with books, the potted plants, and the general lived-in feel in the background make it clear we were still in that cozy room. It was such a fun, unexpected break, capturing his vibrant personality and the lighthearted spirit of our time together that day.

I captured this lively moment of my bearded friend, looking incredibly happy and engaged in what seems to be a creative project. He's sitting barefoot on the floor, surrounded by his tools and materials, with a big smile and holding some wires or cables. On the table in front of him, there are various small pieces, possibly cut tiles or glass, and a white grid-like structure, suggesting he's assembling something intricate. The room has a warm, inviting feel, with bookshelves packed with books, plants adding a touch of greenery, and a desk with a computer in the background. It looks like a busy

photos.caption: Etoile and Josh
photos.captionKii: I captured a wonderfully relaxed moment of my bearded friend, likely the same one who played the flute earlier, unwinding on the sofa. He was smiling gently, looking content, and sitting comfortably with a small, adorable dog nestled right beside him, also looking off to the side. The dog, with its shaggy brown and black fur, looked very much at home. In the background, I could see the rustic stone fireplace and wooden mantelpiece, adding to the cozy, homey feel of the living room, which seemed bathed in natural light. It was such a peaceful and sweet scene.

I captured this heartwarming moment of a friend playing the flute in a cozy living room, bathed in bright sunlight. My bearded friend, wearing a dark t-shirt and white shorts, was completely absorbed in playing his flute while sitting comfortably on the sofa. Standing behind him, a woman with glasses and a striped top looked on with a gentle smile, clearly enjoying the music. The room, with its warm pinkish walls and natural light streaming through the windows, created such a relaxed and intimate atmosphere. It was a lovely, musical afternoon spent enjoying each other's company and the beautif

I captured this relaxed outdoor meal with friends, possibly breakfast or a coffee break, set on a bright grassy patch. We were gathered around a white oval table, enjoying some food and drinks. On the left, a man with a beard was tidying up something with a green cloth, while another bearded friend across from me in a black t-shirt was focused on his plate. Next to him, a woman with long hair and a red skirt was happily eating something with her hands. The table was filled with mugs, a milk bottle, and some pastries on brown paper, creating a cozy and informal atmosphere. In the background, I

I captured this lovely moment of an outdoor meal with friends, possibly breakfast or a casual lunch, set on a sun-dappled grassy patch. We were gathered around a white oval table, enjoying some food and drinks. Two bearded friends were deep in conversation or savoring their plates; one in a green shirt, and the other in a dark t-shirt. Opposite them, a woman with long hair and a red skirt was taking a sip from her mug. The table was cozy with mugs, a milk bottle, and what looked like pastries or bread on brown paper, all under the gentle shade of a tree. In the background, the rustic stone wal

I came across this absolutely enchanting waterfall, tucked away in the dense forest during my explorations. The water cascaded down a rocky incline, sparkling brightly as it met the stream below, which meandered through moss-covered rocks and lush green plants. The sunlight dappled through the overhead trees, illuminating the vibrant greenery and adding to the incredibly peaceful and serene atmosphere. It was such a beautiful, tranquil spot, a true hidden gem in the natural surroundings I was exploring.

I captured a friend exploring this fascinating site, a scattering of massive, weathered stone blocks that looked like ancient ruins or perhaps a natural rock formation, set amidst grassy patches. The bright, clear sky overhead and the fresh green trees in the background created a beautiful contrast with the rough, gray stones. My friend, dressed in a dark t-shirt and pants, was intently looking down, navigating the uneven terrain and perhaps examining one of the historical remnants. It felt like we were uncovering a forgotten piece of history during our journey through the countryside.

I captured this moment of a casual gathering on a quiet dirt path winding through a wooded area. There were three people; two men on the left, one with a beard and a green t-shirt and the other with a green hoodie and beard, holding a drink, and a woman with long hair on the right, wearing a light blue hoodie and jeans, looking towards them. The ground was covered with fallen leaves and grass, and I noticed these rustic piles of stacked firewood on both sides of the path, neatly covered. It really felt like we were deep in the countryside, possibly in the outskirts of the charming village I wa

I paused to take in this incredibly peaceful view of an expansive green field, stretching out under a soft, overcast sky. The tall grass, dotted with delicate yellow and white wildflowers, created such a beautiful texture. In the distance, a dense line of trees marked the edge of the forest, adding to the serene, natural landscape. It felt like a perfect moment of quiet contemplation during my exploration of the countryside, a lovely contrast to the historic village buildings I'd been admiring.

I loved the character of this incredibly old stone building, possibly a barn or an outbuilding, with its striking slate roof. The weathered double wooden doors at the front were particularly captivating; they looked so ancient and worn, with some planks even broken away at the bottom, revealing the age and neglect. There was even a simple wooden stick propped across them, tied with a bit of blue string, almost like a makeshift lock. Above, a smaller wooden door or window added another layer of rustic charm, completing the picture of a building that held so much history within its rough stone w

I took this photo of a rustic scene that felt like stepping back in time. A worn dirt path leads straight into a dense forest, flanked by these incredible old stone buildings. On the right, there's a charming structure with a red-tiled roof and an old wooden shed next to it, while on the left, another stone building stands proudly. The green grass growing around the path and buildings really added to the remote, peaceful atmosphere, making me feel like I was deep in the heart of the countryside, possibly exploring a very old, quiet village.

I captured this striking view of a beautiful, old stone church, looking up at its impressive bell tower under an overcast sky. The ancient stonework, covered in patches of what looks like lichen or moss, really emphasizes its age and history. I loved the detail of the two large bells nestled in the belfry and the small, circular window below them. The old wooden door, slightly ajar at the base, beckoned me inside to explore, adding to the charm of this historic village landmark. It felt so authentic, a true piece of European architectural heritage.

photos.caption: Classic Frenchman
photos.captionKii: I captured this cool moment of a man, possibly a friend or local, looking quite content as he strolled through what seemed like a charming old village. He was perfectly equipped with a fresh baguette tucked under his arm and a bottle of wine in his hand, which felt so authentically European. In the background, the rustic stone buildings and that fantastic vintage green car really completed the picturesque scene, making me wonder if he was on his way to a delightful meal or just enjoying the day.

I captured this view of two companions walking ahead of me, deep within a serene forest. The ground was incredibly lush, blanketed in vibrant green moss, which made the path feel soft and natural. Tall, slender trees rose all around us, creating a peaceful canopy, and in the distance, I could just make out an open clearing beyond the dense woods. It was a wonderful day for a hike, enjoying the quiet beauty of nature.

I captured this cool shot of a man in a vibrant red shirt, standing framed within a large, multi-arched window of an incredibly old stone building. The intricate design of the window, with its multiple smaller arches supported by columns, and the beautiful stone railing in the foreground, really caught my eye. The rough-hewn stone walls of the building give it such a timeless and historic feel, truly showcasing the impressive architecture of this village.

I captured this cool shot of my friend standing on a high balcony, looking out through a set of beautifully arched stone windows within this incredible historic building. The intricate stone carvings on the balcony railing and the rough-hewn walls really highlight the age and character of this place. Below, I could see people walking through an arched passageway, adding to the sense of depth and activity within this grand structure. It was such a unique architectural detail to stumble upon while exploring.

From my elevated position, I captured this striking, steeply angled view looking down into the historic cliffside village. The perspective truly emphasizes how the buildings are dramatically nestled against the rocky cliff face, with their varied tiled roofs visible along the winding road. Lush green trees cover the surrounding slopes, contrasting beautifully with the ancient stone structures and the narrow road where I can just make out a few parked cars. It's incredible to see the village laid out like this, almost appearing to cling to the side of the mountain.

From an incredibly high vantage point, I took this dizzying, almost vertical shot looking straight down into the historic cliffside village. It's fascinating to see the tops of the buildings with their varied red and grey tiled roofs, and the narrow, winding streets below, where tiny figures of people and even miniature cars are just visible. To the right, there's a clear delineation where the built environment gives way to a lush green forest, a winding dirt path or road, and a light-colored riverbed. This view truly gives a unique perspective on how the village is nestled right into the natu

From high above, I captured this impressive bird's-eye view of the historic village, where I could really appreciate its intricate layout nestled within the landscape. The various shades of tiled roofs — some terracotta red, others dark grey or blue — created a beautiful mosaic, showcasing the age and character of the buildings below. I could clearly see the winding streets and pathways, bustling with what look like tiny figures moving about, and cars parked in designated areas. Surrounding the village, the lush green trees extended towards a winding dirt road or path, and a narrow, light brow

From my elevated position, I captured this sweeping view looking down over a section of the historic village and the landscape stretching beyond it. In the foreground, I could see the distinctive red and darker tiled roofs of the old buildings, clustered together along what looks like a main street, with a busy parking lot to the right. My gaze then follows a winding, unpaved road that runs parallel to a narrow, light brown river or stream. Beyond that, the valley opens up into lush green fields dotted with trees, and the light-colored, rocky terrain of the hills in the distance. It really put

From this elevated perspective, I captured a breathtaking view looking down over the dramatic cliffside, which plunges into a densely forested valley. A winding, rustic path snakes its way down the green slope, hinting at more areas to explore within this historic setting. On the right, I could see part of a charming old building with a red-tiled roof and light-colored walls, nestled amongst the trees and blending perfectly with the natural landscape. The sheer scale of the cliffs and the lush, untouched greenery below really emphasized the unique, rugged beauty of this ancient village.

I'm looking down from a high vantage point, capturing the quintessential view over the ancient, weathered tiled roof of what must be one of the village buildings. Beyond it, the landscape opens up into a dramatic, verdant valley, carved out by nature and dotted with lush green trees. I can see a winding road snaking its way through the valley floor, connecting different parts of this incredible area. The towering, rocky cliffs covered in dense foliage on either side really frame the scene, emphasizing the depth and grandeur of this historic location.

During my exploration of the historic village, I couldn't resist capturing this close-up of an incredibly old and weathered wooden door. It was set right into a sturdy stone wall, and what really caught my eye were the elaborate, rustic metal hinges that snaked across its surface, giving it so much character. At the very bottom, there was this tiny, almost square cutout, making me wonder what creature or purpose it served in the past. The ground in front was paved with beautiful, worn flagstones, with bits of grass and wildflowers poking through the cracks, adding to the ancient, lived-in feel

I caught a quiet moment of contemplation as someone stood by the old tiled roof of one of the historic structures, gazing out at the vast, green landscape stretching into the distance under the heavy, overcast sky. The weathered tiles and sturdy stone wall in the foreground really emphasized the ancient feel of this place, providing a perfect spot to pause and take in the panoramic views of the surrounding countryside from this elevated position. It was a really peaceful scene amidst all the exploration.

I captured this impressive wide view looking down into a vast, lush green valley, defined by its dramatic, layered cliff faces on either side. A winding road snaked its way through the valley floor, connecting various points within this incredible natural landscape. In the foreground, a decorative, pinecone-shaped finial on a metal railing provided a nice architectural detail, framing the expansive vista. I could also see a narrow, possibly cantilevered viewing platform extending from the cliff edge on the right, giving another perspective over the sprawling scene under the overcast sky.

From this vantage point within the historic stone complex, I captured a beautiful view looking down into the valley. The sturdy stone walkway with its metal railings snaked around, offering a path to further explore or a spot to simply take in the scenery. Below, a neatly kept garden space stretched out, featuring a lone, vibrant green tree and intriguing decorative patterns on the ground, all enclosed by a low stone wall. In the background, the dramatic, layered cliff faces rose, densely covered with green trees and foliage, emphasizing the unique natural setting of this incredible place.

What an incredible view from above into a beautiful inner courtyard, part of one of the magnificent stone chateaus here. I loved how the vibrant green ivy clung to the ancient stone walls, adding a touch of wildness to the grand architecture. To the right, a charming arched cloister stretched along the building, and further on, the main structure rose with its stone facades and dark, pitched roof. On the left, a stately cylindrical tower, complete with battlements and a flagpole, stood tall, reminding me of the long history these walls have witnessed. The neatly kept grassy courtyard below had

Looking down from another high point, I captured this incredible wide shot of the valley, stretching out before me. The historic village clung to the left side, its distinctive red-tiled roofs nestled amongst the dense, vibrant green foliage that covered the slopes and filled the valley floor. A winding road snaked through the lush landscape, connecting the village and extending further into the open, cultivated fields. The scale of it all was just breathtaking, really emphasizing how deeply integrated the settlement was with its dramatic natural surroundings, a truly amazing sight during our

What an expansive view from up here! I captured this wide panorama looking down into the lush green valley, where the historic village with its red-tiled roofs spread out along the winding river or road below. The dense trees covered the slopes, contrasting with the more barren, rocky sections of the cliff face further up. A road snaked through the bottom of the valley, connecting parts of the settlement, which really highlighted the journey through this incredible landscape. It was amazing to see how the village was nestled into such a dramatic natural setting, a truly memorable sight during

From this incredible vantage point, I captured a sweeping panoramic view of the historic cliffside village nestled in the valley below. The scene was absolutely breathtaking, with the village's distinct red-tiled roofs contrasting beautifully against the vibrant green of the surrounding trees and the rugged, grey rock faces of the cliffs. A winding road snaked through the lush landscape, connecting parts of the village, which seemed to cascade down the slopes. It really gave a sense of how vast and integrated the settlement was with its dramatic natural surroundings, making me appreciate the s

I really loved the intricate details of the ancient architecture we encountered in this historic village. This weathered wooden door, studded with countless metal rivets arranged in a diagonal pattern, truly caught my eye. It looked so sturdy and old, hinting at centuries of stories within its heavy planks. In the background, three of my friends were standing near an opening, looking intently towards the gate or discussing where to go next, perhaps admiring another part of the historic site. One friend in a red jacket had his back to me, another in a white hoodie was looking up, and the third

As we explored the historic cliffside village, I looked up through the dense, vibrant green foliage and spotted this striking old building. It had a prominent steeple with a conical roof and what looked like a clock face, giving it the feel of a church or a significant town tower. The cloudy, overcast sky added a dramatic, almost moody atmosphere, really highlighting the ancient stone structure as it rose above the trees. It felt like another hidden gem waiting to be discovered within the expansive and historic landscape we were exploring.

I captured this moment of my friends taking in the incredible views from one of the village's overlooks. One friend, wearing a red jacket, was standing on a stone ledge, intently focused on his camera or device, possibly capturing the rugged cliff faces and lush valley below. Another friend in a white hoodie stood next to him, also admiring the expansive landscape. In the background, a third person stood by a stone wall, enjoying the atmosphere. The ancient stone architecture of the building contrasted beautifully with the wild, green landscape of the valley and the distant, rocky cliffs, all

I captured another shot of my friend, still engrossed in photographing the stunning panorama from our viewpoint. Here, he's standing with his back to me, camera raised, completely absorbed in framing the shot. We were looking out over an incredibly vibrant green valley, with rolling hillsides blanketed in trees. In the distance, a charming village with its array of buildings nestled on the opposing slope, all under a soft, overcast sky. It was a moment of quiet appreciation for the vast landscape and the historic beauty stretching before us, and I loved seeing him capture it.

From a scenic overlook, I captured my friend completely focused on taking a photograph of the expansive green valley and the charming village in the distance. He stood with his back to me, camera raised to his eye, embodying the moment of capturing the beauty around us. The valley was incredibly lush and verdant, with rolling hillsides covered in dense trees, and I could just make out a road winding through it. The village, nestled on the opposite hill, looked so picturesque with its cluster of buildings under the soft, diffused light of the overcast sky. It was such a perfect spot to pause an

I loved capturing this perspective of the village, showcasing the incredible multi-level construction and the winding stone paths that led us through it. We were walking down a set of stone steps, observing other visitors navigating through arched passageways carved into the thick stone walls. The ancient buildings with their sturdy stone blocks and small, arched windows seemed to blend seamlessly with the natural rock. I could see how the architecture cleverly utilized the terrain, with different levels connected by these beautiful old pathways. It really emphasized the feeling of exploring a

I paused to capture this impressive view of a grand entrance, likely to a church or a significant building within the historic village. The large, rounded archway, beautifully crafted from light-colored stone, invited us inside. Above it, I noticed a smaller decorative arch with what looked like a coat of arms, and further up, a series of three elegant arched windows with columns, adding to the building's ancient charm. My friend, wearing a white hoodie and carrying a bag, was just ascending the worn stone steps, heading into the shadows of the entrance. It felt like stepping into a place fill

I was completely captivated by this striking view, looking up at one of the village's impressive stone towers that seemed to grow directly out of the dramatic cliff face. The tower was tall and cylindrical, built with sturdy stone blocks, and topped with battlements and a distinctive conical roof, crowned by a decorative spire. To the left, I could see the pitched terracotta roof and white-shuttered windows of another historic building, beautifully nestled into the rugged landscape. The sheer rock face above was just incredible, truly showing how this ancient settlement was carved into its nat

I loved capturing this incredible panoramic view looking down into the valley, showcasing the dramatic, multi-layered rock cliffs that define this historic village. The steep, rugged faces of the cliffs were softened by the vibrant green foliage and trees clinging to their sides, creating a beautiful contrast. I could just make out a winding road snaking its way through the lush landscape in the distance, hinting at the paths we were exploring. From my vantage point high up, I loved capturing this scenic view looking down into the heart of the historic village. Walking through the narrow streets of this incredible cliffside village felt like stepping back in time. There are little shops and cafes with colorful awnings, and I can see other people strolling along, soaking in the atmosphere. Beyond the buildings in the distance, you can just make out the dramatic cliffs that give this village its unique character, even under the soft, overcast sky.

photos.caption: Wall murals.

The sheer scale and detail of the artwork were astounding, with countless swirling patterns and bursts of color creating a breathtaking visual tapestry. Walking alongside it, I felt dwarfed by the massive canvas, taking in every unique section. There's a paved path running parallel to it, and in the distance, I can see someone else admiring the art, giving a sense of the immense length of this urban masterpiece. It r

I really enjoyed discovering the incredible street art during my Berlin sightseeing. This particular piece of graffiti caught my eye with its vibrant colors and thought-provoking message. The words 'TIME HAS CHANGED US...' are painted in a bold, stylized blue script against a dynamic background of pink, red, blue, and white spray paint. It was fascinating to see how the city's walls tell stories and reflect different aspects of its culture and history. This artwork felt like a poignant reflection amidst all the lively urban exploration.

photos.caption: What's left of the Wall.
photos.captionKii: I stumbled upon this incredible stretch of wall, absolutely bursting with vibrant graffiti and street art. The colors just popped against the partly cloudy sky, and it was fascinating to walk alongside it, taking in all the different styles and messages. There's a paved path running parallel to it, with green grass beyond, and I could see a few people in the distance, also exploring this impactful and visually striking landmark. It felt like such a significant and visually striking part of my Berlin journey, really showcasing the city's artistic and historical layers.

photos.caption: Design and art history nerd heaven.
photos.captionKii: I captured this vibrant sign for the Bauhaus-Archiv, the Museum of Design, against a brilliant blue sky with a long contrail stretching across it. The sign itself is a striking display of colorful squares in red, yellow, blue, and teal, with bold black letters spelling out the museum's name. It was exciting to come across this, as I love exploring design and art, and it felt like a perfect addition to my sightseeing adventures in Berlin. The clear weather made it even more pleasant for exploring the city's cultural offerings.

photos.caption: Typical Berlin eatery, with blankets!

Each chair had a soft-looking light blue blanket draped over it, suggesting it might get a bit cool in the evenings, adding to the cozy ambiance. There were also planters filled with lush green foliage, bringing a touch of nature to the urban environment. The wall stretches far into the distance, completely adorned with an explosion of vibrant, abstract patterns, swirling lines, and vivid colors like blues, reds, yellows, and whites, all outlined in black. It feels like a continuous, living canvas. You can see someone walking along the pavement next to the wall, giving a sense of just how long and immersive this open-air gallery is. Even on an overcast day, the art just radiated energy.

It felt like such a memorable and expressive part of the city's artistic landscape.

It felt like I was physically interacting with the light itself, almost as if I could hold it. The stark contrast against the deep darkness was truly mesmerizing, making the light feel almost tangible and alive.

photos.caption: Lovely path
photos.captionKii: I captured this serene view during a peaceful walk through a beautiful park. The path stretches ahead, inviting me deeper into the lush greenery, framed by tall, mature trees with their full, vibrant leaves creating a natural canopy overhead. It feels so tranquil here, a perfect escape. On the right, a couple of dark benches are nestled under the trees, offering a quiet spot to rest and take in the natural beauty. The dappled light filtering through the leaves and the quiet path make for a truly refreshing experience.

Several people, including two young girls in colorful jackets, are completely engrossed, watching the spectacle with wide-eyed wonder. I loved capturing this joyful moment with my friends in front of the magnificent Brandenburg Gate! It was incredible to finally see this iconic landmark in person. My friends are all beaming, and you can really feel the excitement of being there, standing right under the massive columns and looking up at the famous Quadriga with its four horses. The slightly muted, almost vintage-looking filter adds a cool touch to the picture, making it feel even more special. It was such a memorable part of our Berlin exploration.

photos.caption: At the circus
photos.captionKii: As we continued our exploration, I captured this street sign. It's interesting to see how the two signs on the pole both point to "Am Zirkus", which translates to 'At the Circus'. It made me wonder about the history of this street. In the background, a tall construction crane stands prominently against the cloudy sky, indicating the ongoing development and change within the city. The green treetops visible at the bottom add a small touch of nature to this otherwise urban scene. It's always fascinating to observe these small details while walking around a new city.

It was a powerful moment, standing right on the spot where such a significant piece of history unfolded, and it made me pause to reflect on the city's past.
