photos.captionKii: I was really drawn to this beautifully crafted sculpted face, which features such striking, distinct bands of color. The top section, covering the forehead, is a soft, light pink, while the middle part around the eyes and nose is a lovely calming blue. The lower portion, including the mouth and chin, is painted a refreshing mint green. The eyes are closed, giving the face a serene and almost contemplative expression, and the texture of the material, likely plaster or clay, looks quite tactile. It's resting on a warm wooden surface, which creates a natural, earthy backdrop and really makes the

photos.caption: Street corner
photos.captionKii: I was drawn to the quiet atmosphere of this suburban street scene, likely captured around dusk or dawn. The prominent wooden utility pole, laden with an intricate web of wires crisscrossing the sky, really stood out to me as a fascinating piece of urban infrastructure. It almost feels like an unintentional piece of industrial art against the subtly changing colors of the sky, which has a gentle, almost painterly gradient of pale yellow-orange blending into a soft grey overhead. I noticed the 'QUEEN ST' sign clearly visible on the pole, giving the place a specific identity. The single illuminat

photos.caption: texture
photos.captionKii: I was really captivated by this abstract composition of textures and colors, almost like a piece of found art. It looks like a section of a surface that has undergone some form of weathering or decay, featuring a smooth, muted grey-green area at the top. Below that, there's a fascinating layer of rough, earthy orange material, perhaps peeling paint or insulation, with a highly irregular, jagged edge that creates a striking visual boundary. Further down, a thick, white, bubbly, or foam-like texture creates a vivid contrast, adding another layer of intricate detail. I loved how the different mat

I took this photo looking up from underneath some vibrant green plant leaves, probably from a pea plant or something similar, with its delicate tendrils reaching towards the sky. The sunlight filtered through the leaves beautifully, illuminating their intricate vein patterns and making them glow. I loved how the light highlighted the organic details against the soft blue sky, giving a sense of growth and natural beauty from a unique perspective.

I was really drawn to the intricate beauty of these large green leaves, capturing a close-up that highlights their delicate, almost web-like vein patterns. The sunlight filtered through them, making the veins glow and creating this beautiful, natural transparency against the bright background. I love how the jagged edges and slightly curled forms of the leaves add to the organic texture. It was another moment where I wanted to capture the stunning details nature hides in plain sight, showcasing its artistry up close.

I loved how this shot captured the underside of what looks like an Agapanthus or Lily of the Nile flower, with its delicate, pale purple petals reaching out. I took it from a very low angle, looking straight up towards the bright sunlight. The sun's rays created a beautiful lens flare and backlit the flower, making its individual stalks and buds glow. You can see the vibrant burst of light behind it, giving the scene an almost ethereal quality. It was another moment where I wanted to highlight the intricate beauty of nature from a unique perspective.

I continued my exploration of natural details by focusing on this large, vibrant green leaf. Its surface was a rich tapestry of veins, but what truly caught my eye were the numerous holes, each one a little window telling a story of life and interaction with its environment. The sunlight highlighted the contours of the leaf, and I could also spot some delicate, curly tendrils nearby, adding another layer of intricate texture to the scene. It was a beautiful reminder of nature's imperfect beauty.

I captured a detailed close-up of a large, vibrant green leaf, likely from a garden plant, focusing on its intricate vein structure. It had several holes, which told a story of its natural environment, perhaps from insects. To the right, I could see the delicate, vine-like tendrils of another plant, adding a contrast in texture. The bright sunlight illuminated the leaf beautifully, highlighting its surface, and in the background, a subtle hint of a building provided context. I wanted to remember these small, imperfect details of nature.

I was captivated by the exquisite beauty of this large, pristine white flower, which I captured in a detailed close-up. Its soft, wide petals gently unfurled, revealing a stunning, vibrant magenta-pink center that contrasted beautifully with the white. The delicate folds and textures of the petals were clearly visible, and the surrounding rich green leaves provided a natural frame. I loved how the natural light highlighted its form, making it stand out as a perfect example of nature's artistry.

I captured this incredibly detailed close-up of what appears to be fluffy, white dried plant material, possibly seed heads or delicate flowers. The intricate strands and feathery textures are brought into sharp focus, showcasing a delicate beauty. In the background, there are hints of soft, faded colors like pink and blue, suggesting other elements of dried flora. I was really drawn to the unique, almost ethereal texture and wanted to preserve this intimate view of nature's delicate artistry.

photos.caption: giant bike monster
photos.captionKii: I captured this lively street scene, which looked like a vibrant parade or festival. There were several people on a truly unique multi-person bicycle rig, with some playing instruments as they rode along. I could see one person in a pink outfit playing a clarinet, another with a tuba, and someone else with a drum, all contributing to the festive atmosphere. A person in an orange vest seemed to be guiding, while the person in front wore a blue helmet and had a serious expression. Spectators lined the street, adding to the energy of the moment. It was a really creative and fun display to witness

photos.caption: lauren
photos.captionKii: I snapped this fun photo of my friend playfully balancing a festive gingerbread house on her head, looking up with her tongue sticking out and making a silly face. She had her hands up to steady the house, which was decorated with white icing, red berries, and a little Santa figure on the front. We were indoors, and the background with various pictures and a doorway suggested a cozy, casual setting. It was a lighthearted and memorable moment, full of holiday cheer and laughter as we enjoyed some festive activities together.

photos.caption: geoff and josh
photos.captionKii: I captured this moment of two friends standing together, smiling for the camera, as we overlooked a sprawling city panorama. On the left, my friend with a bald head was wearing a striped t-shirt and dark pants, while the friend on the right, with a beard and hair tied back, sported a green t-shirt with a bicycle graphic and cargo shorts. They both had their arms around each other, looking relaxed and happy. Behind them, a dark metal railing separated us from the vast urban landscape that stretched out under a cloudy sky, showcasing countless buildings and trees. It was a great moment to apprec

photos.caption: Simon's brother and dad.
photos.captionKii: I took this picture during our farm outing, capturing a moment as two friends stood by a metal gate. On the left, my friend with a grey beard and shorts had his hands on his hips, looking over. Next to him, another friend with dark hair and sunglasses was observing the scene, wearing a dark t-shirt and cargo shorts. The gate itself had a clear sign that read "LANDMARK PLEASE SHUT GATE", and there was a blue bucket on the grassy ground nearby. It was a bright, sunny day, and the rural landscape stretched out behind them, perfectly reflecting the relaxed atmosphere of our visit to the farm.

photos.caption: Discussing goat-y things while Josh sneezes.
photos.captionKii: I captured this moment of my friends gathered by a metal gate during our farm outing, enjoying the beautiful sunny day. On the far left, a friend with a straw hat and a beard was holding something red, seemingly inspecting it. Next to him, another friend, also in a straw hat, was leaning casually on the gate, engaged in conversation with the two friends on the right. One of them, wearing a dark t-shirt and shorts, was facing away, while the friend on the far right with a white beard and shorts was looking towards the group. The lush green field stretched out behind the gate, and the clear blue

I captured this scene of my friends gathered at the fence during our farm outing. Four of them were standing, with two wearing straw hats, looking out into the field where I could see some goats in the distance on the left. One friend was leaning casually on the sturdy wooden gatepost, while another with grey hair was standing further back, observing. The sun was bright, and the green grass around them indicated a beautiful day for exploring the farm. It was a nice moment of camaraderie as we took in the rural surroundings and enjoyed the fresh air.

I captured this moment of my friends gathered around a gate on the farm, taking in the scene. On the left, one friend in a straw hat was leaning against the wooden post, while another friend with a gray beard and a straw hat was casually resting his arm on the metal gate, looking into the enclosure. To the right, another friend stood observing with his hands on his hips. Behind the fence, I could clearly see several goats we were visiting, moving around in their sunny, grassy field. It was such a beautiful, clear day for our outing, and this was a typical relaxed scene as we explored the farm.

photos.caption: this is how you move goats from one place to another.  "move goats, move".
photos.captionKii: I managed to capture another great shot of my friend, wearing his familiar straw hat and a grey t-shirt, from behind as he stood by the metal gate of the goat enclosure. He was surrounded by a bunch of goats, including some playful kids, all eager for attention. It looks like he was either entering or leaving the enclosure, as the gate was slightly ajar, and I could even see a small 'PLEASE SHUT GATE' sign, which made me smile. The bright sunshine and green grassy field made for such a lovely backdrop to our animal adventure that day.

photos.caption: goat pile.
photos.captionKii: I captured this lively moment by the fence, where a whole group of goats had gathered! There were quite a few, including some adorable smaller ones, all clustered around the metal gate and a sturdy wooden post. It looks like they might have been waiting for some attention or food. In the background, I can just make out one of my companions through the wire fence and the bodies of the goats. The bright blue sky and open grassy field really set the scene for our memorable day with these charming animals.

I captured this lovely scene of several goats enjoying their time in a sunny, grassy enclosure during our farm outing. There are three prominent goats: one with a brown head and white body standing near the fence looking slightly away, another smaller one with similar markings peeking through the wire mesh, and a third mostly white goat with brown spots on its head and back, standing further inside. The rustic wooden posts and wire fence define their space, and in the background, I can see more open fields under a bright blue sky, suggesting it was a beautiful clear day for our visit. It was c

photos.caption: Some necessary ear-tagging is going on here.  Josh and James restrain the goat while Simon and dad give the goat a very fashionable earring.
photos.captionKii: I captured this moment during our farm outing, showing some friends engaged in what looked like a repair or task near the fence. In the foreground, my friend with grey hair and a beard was focused on something on the ground, possibly working on the fence or a pipe, while another friend in a straw hat was also crouching to help. A third friend in sunglasses was observing from behind. Through the wire mesh, I could just make out a glimpse of a goat with brown and white markings, watching us curiously from the background. The sun was bright, highlighting the tall green grass, and it was a typical

I captured another moment from our day in the fields, this time focusing on a couple of my companions by the fence. One friend, sporting a straw hat and a dark t-shirt, is leaning casually against a weathered wooden fence post, looking out over the landscape. Next to him, another friend with short grey hair is kneeling in the tall, green grass, seemingly observing something interesting closer to the ground. The sun was shining brightly, casting a clear blue sky above, and in the distance, I could still spot that serene body of water, making it a truly picturesque and relaxing day.

It was another lovely moment at the goat enclosure, catching my friends engaging with the animals! I captured this close-up of one friend, wearing his straw hat and a blue t-shirt, kneeling down by the wire fence. He's gently reaching through to pet a beautiful white goat, which seems to be enjoying the attention. Behind him, another friend with glasses and a beard, in a brown t-shirt, is looking down, observing the interaction. The tall green grass around the fence really brings out the rustic charm of our day with the goats.

photos.caption: Oh my god, I'm totally laying on a goat! — No seriously though, some necessary ear-tagging is going on here.  Josh and James restrain the goat while Simon and dad give the goat a very fashionable earring.
photos.captionKii: I captured this candid moment of a few friends having a lively time behind a wire fence, enjoying the sunny outdoors. The man on the left, sporting a straw hat and sunglasses, was particularly expressive, with a wide open mouth as if laughing or cheering, really bringing out the fun energy of the day. Another friend, also in a straw hat, was bent over, perhaps looking at something interesting or interacting with something on the ground, with another person visible just behind them. The tall, lush green grass and the rustic wire fence created a perfect backdrop for our relaxed farm outing.

It was another lovely scene from our day with the goats! I captured this moment through the wire fence, showing a couple of my companions engaging with the animals in the tall green grass. One friend in a straw hat and dark blue shirt is standing by the wooden post, while another in a brown t-shirt and shorts watches on, and a third in a grey shirt also with a straw hat observes from the right. What really caught my eye was the man bending down, seemingly interacting with or getting a closer look at one of the adorable white and brown baby goats, which was just on the other side of the fence.

It was another lovely moment today, catching a wider view of my friends gathered near the fence in the sunny, grassy field during our goat encounter. I spotted the man in the brown t-shirt and denim shorts, who was leaning against the wooden post earlier, now standing closer to a brown and white goat. Several other companions are also in the frame, some wearing straw hats, observing the animals or simply enjoying the clear day. In the distance, I can see a body of water, adding to the serene, rural atmosphere of the day.

It was another lovely moment today in the field with the goats! I caught this shot of my friend in his brown t-shirt and denim shorts, leaning against the wooden fence post, seemingly observing or interacting with the goats inside the enclosure. He's mostly facing away from me, looking towards the field. One of the beautiful white goats with those distinct brown markings on its head and ears is looking right at me, making eye contact. The tall green and dry grass under the clear blue sky really gives a sense of the peaceful, rural setting we were enjoying.

photos.caption: simon and goat — Simon and one of the young goats on his family's farm.
photos.captionKii: What a joyful moment! I captured this shot of one of my companions, wearing his straw cowboy hat, absolutely beaming as he held one of the adorable baby goats. The little goat, with its white body and brown head, looked so sweet and content in his arms. In the background, another friend in a similar straw hat was leaning on the fence, just enjoying the sunny day with us and the animals. It was such a bright and happy scene out in the field.

photos.caption: simon and goat — Simon and one of the young goats on his family's farm.
photos.captionKii: What a fun moment this was! While we were still enjoying our time with the goats today, I caught a glimpse of this guy, wearing a straw cowboy hat, as he picked up one of the adorable baby goats. He made such a funny face, puckering his lips as if he was trying to give the little one a kiss or just being playful. The baby goat, with its mostly white fur and those cute brown markings on its head and ears, looked so sweet and comfortable nestled in his arms. It was a perfectly sunny day out in the field by the fence, and seeing everyone interact with these charming animals was just delightful.

photos.caption: that's not a dog... — ...it's a goat, though it really really looks like a dog.
photos.captionKii: I spotted this adorable young goat, mostly white with distinctive brown patches on its head, peering out from behind a wire fence. It was standing amidst a patch of tall, lush green grass that nearly reached its back, creating a lovely, natural setting. I loved how the bright sunlight highlighted its soft white fur, and it seemed to be curiously looking away, perhaps at something interesting just out of frame. It was a charming moment capturing one of the farm animals during our outing.

I got another shot of these lovely goats through the fence today. This one gives a closer look at a particularly fluffy white goat with those distinctive brown markings on its head, looking down as if it's concentrating on grazing. The wire and wooden fence posts are really prominent in the foreground, giving a sense of looking into their enclosure, and you can just see another goat in the background. It was such a peaceful moment, watching them just go about their day in the sun.

I stumbled upon this charming group of goats today, all gathered around a wire fence in a sunny field. It looks like they were enjoying a bit of a snack, with one of them reaching right through the fence to munch on the lush green grass. Their mostly white coats, with those distinctive brown markings, really stood out against the vibrant greenery. It was such a lovely, peaceful scene, a real snapshot of rural life.

I was fascinated by this distinctive, long flower cone I saw today. Its intricate surface is covered in so many tiny, tightly packed structures, giving it such a unique texture. The top part has this beautiful reddish-brown hue that gradually lightens towards the base, which is nestled among these lovely silvery-green, serrated leaves. The clear blue sky in the background really makes it pop, highlighting the natural beauty and complexity of this plant. It's incredible how many different forms nature creates!

I captured this close-up of a unique plant, focusing on its distinct leaves and stem. The leaves are a muted green, with delicate serrated edges and a fascinating textured surface, especially visible on their undersides. They seem to grow in an alternating pattern up the sturdy stem. In the soft-focus background, I can just make out hints of the plant's more mature, brown seed pods or flowers, suggesting a fuller bush. The bright sunlight really brought out the subtle details and the overall organic beauty of this plant, a wonderful detail to pause and appreciate during my outdoor time.

I was really drawn to this incredibly unique yellow flower today. Its bright, almost fluorescent yellow petals stand out so much, and they're arranged in such a fascinating spiky, radial pattern. The texture looks almost like delicate filaments or tiny brushes, all clustered around a darker, more textured center. The sunlight really makes it pop against the darker green foliage in the background. It's just another reminder of all the amazing, intricate forms you find in nature.

I took a moment to capture this beautiful close-up of a white and yellow flower. Its petals, soft white on the outside and transitioning to a vibrant yellow-orange in the center, glowed under the bright sunlight. The intricate pattern of the pollen-rich center was really striking. Surrounding the bloom, the dark green leaves of the plant provided a lush, shadowy backdrop, making the flower stand out even more. It was a lovely, serene detail to observe during our outdoor time.

I spotted this absolutely stunning peach-colored rose today, bathed in sunlight. The way the petals spiral inwards is just mesmerizing, and I love the subtle gradient from the deeper coral center to the softer pinks on the outer edges. The dark green leaves in the background make the vibrant bloom pop even more. It was such a beautiful sight, I just had to capture it.

What a gorgeous panoramic view from up here! I just had to capture this wide expanse of rolling green hills, all those beautiful shades of green stretching out as far as the eye can see. You can even spot the faint blue line of the ocean way out on the horizon, reminding me we're still on our coastal adventure. The sky is so clear with those fluffy white clouds, and the tall grass in the foreground really gives you that feeling of being on a bluff, taking it all in.

Ha, what a great candid moment! Here's my friend in the back seat of the car, giving me a funny, surprised look while pulling down his sunglasses. He's still sporting that awesome straw cowboy hat, which really fit the laid-back vibe of our trip. You can tell we were on the road with his seatbelt on, and through the window, the blurry trees suggest we were surrounded by nature. It's moments like these that make our adventures so memorable and fun!

photos.caption: josh, simon and i
photos.captionKii: What a great shot of us taking a break during our coastal drive! Here we are, three of us, casually perched on the metal guardrail with that incredible ocean view stretching out behind us and hazy hills in the distance. I remember how relaxed we all felt, enjoying the fresh air and the beautiful landscape. One of my friends is even barefoot, showing just how comfortable we were, and another is sporting a cool cowboy hat, perfectly fitting the laid-back vibe of our coastal adventure.

photos.caption: josh, simon, and i
photos.captionKii: What a great shot of us taking a break during our coastal drive! Here we are, a few of us, posing by the guardrail with that incredible ocean view stretching out behind us. The water looks so calm and expansive, just blending into the hazy distance, with the coastline winding along. It was such a perfect spot to pull over, stretch our legs, and really soak in the scenery from a different vantage point along the road. You can even see the front of our car slightly in the foreground, reminding me of our journey.

What a vibrant display of nature! This image captures a dense, green hillside, packed with lush trees and shrubs growing on a steep, rugged slope. The light from the sky is so bright, almost stark, creating a beautiful contrast with the deep greens of the foliage. It really highlights the wild, untamed beauty of the coastal landscape, a different perspective from the beach but still very much part of our scenic journey.

What a breathtaking view of the ocean from up here! I love how the water shifts from that bright turquoise close to the land to a deep, dark blue stretching out to the horizon. The tall, dry grasses in the foreground really frame the vastness of the sea, making it feel so natural and untouched. It was such a peaceful moment, just taking in the endless expanse of the water and the clear sky above, a perfect continuation of our day exploring the coast.

What a bright and sunny day it was! I snapped this cool shot of my friend, who looks like he's really enjoying the open air, gazing up towards the clear blue sky with just a few scattered clouds. His sunglasses are perfectly reflecting the sunlight, and you can really feel the warmth of the sun here. It was great to just enjoy the beautiful weather and the vastness of the sky during our outing.

During our coastal adventure, we had some fun taking playful photos by the car. Here, a friend of mine is peeking out from behind our silver car, wearing cool sunglasses and a straw hat. You can also spot another straw hat resting on the car's roof! In the background, the serene beach and ocean stretch out, with other cars parked nearby and lush hills in the distance. It was such a bright, clear day, perfect for enjoying the scenery and goofing around a bit during our drive.

What a fun day at the beach! Here's a friend of mine, captured mid-action, wearing a straw hat and focused on throwing a bright yellow frisbee across the wide sandy shore. You can see the frisbee soaring through the air! In the background, there's another person walking further down the beach, and a blue beach tent set up, with buildings nestled among the trees on the hills. It was great to just enjoy the sun and play some games by the ocean.

It looks like another lively shot from our day at the beach! There's so much going on, with people scattered all over the wide stretch of sand. I can see someone in a dark shirt and light shorts, wearing a hat, walking along, and further back, a bright yellow frisbee is soaring through the air, probably part of a game. Near the water, there's even a little dog running around! The waves are gently rolling in by the rocky breakwater, and the hillside in the background is just covered with trees and all those houses, making for such a scenic backdrop to our fun day out.

What a busy and fun scene at the beach! I caught my friend, still in his straw hat and dark shirt, in the middle of a playful run on the sand. He's really getting into the action, maybe chasing after a frisbee or about to throw something. The beach is so lively with other people enjoying the water, including someone standing on a board out by the waves near the rocky breakwater. Further down, there's a group walking along the shore, and even someone flying a kite! The hills in the background, covered with trees and dotted with houses, really complete the beautiful coastal view. It was such a v

It looks like I caught my friends mid-action on the beach! The one in the foreground, with his back to me and wearing that cool straw hat and dark t-shirt, seems to be winding up for a throw or just made one. Further down the sandy beach, another friend, also in a straw hat, is looking towards us with arms slightly open, perhaps ready to catch. The waves are gently breaking behind them, and that big, tree-covered hill makes for such a grand backdrop to our fun day by the sea.

What a fantastic action shot of my friend enjoying himself on the beach! He's right in the middle of a throw or catch with that bright yellow frisbee, his arms out wide and a big smile on his face. He's got his hat on, just soaking up the sun and fun. Behind him, the waves are rolling in, and you can see that line of rocks stretching out into the water. The beach looks so wide and inviting, and in the distance, you can see all those trees and houses nestled on the hills overlooking the coast. It was such a lively and sunny day, perfect for some frisbee by the sea!

What a perfect moment captured of my friend actively enjoying the beach! He's barefoot in the sand, mid-throw with that bright yellow frisbee, facing out towards the ocean. He's still got on his straw hat and dark shorts, just like earlier. The waves are rolling in gently, creating that lovely white foam, and I can even spot someone else swimming in the distance. And there's that long pier stretching out into the sea in the background again, reminding me of the beautiful views we were soaking in. It was such a fun and active day by the water!

What a bright, sunny day we had at the beach! Here's a friend of mine captured mid-action, expertly kicking and throwing a bright yellow frisbee across the wide sandy shore. The waves are gently breaking behind them, and I can see other people enjoying the water further down the beach. That long pier in the distance and the lush green hill make for such a beautiful coastal backdrop. It was just perfect for some fun and games by the ocean!

What a perfect sunny day for some beach fun! Here's a friend of mine captured mid-throw, sending a bright yellow frisbee soaring across the sandy beach. The waves are gently rolling in, and you can spot other people enjoying the water in the distance. The lush, tree-covered hill in the background really completes this beautiful coastal scene. It was so much fun just relaxing and playing by the ocean.

What a beautiful day at the beach! Here's a friend enjoying the wide, sandy shore with the waves gently rolling in. They're wearing a hat and light clothing, possibly running or just taking a stroll, and in the distance, I can even spot a yellow frisbee mid-air, adding to the lively, active vibe of our outing. The green, tree-covered hill in the background frames the scene perfectly, really highlighting the coastal landscape we've been exploring. It's moments like these, soaking up the sun and the sea air, that make these adventures so much fun and truly memorable.

What a lively shot of my friend on the beach! He's captured mid-action, almost like he's doing a little kick or dance move on the wet sand near the water's edge. He's wearing that cool straw hat again, facing away from me towards the ocean. The waves are rolling in, and in the distance, you can clearly see a long pier stretching out into the water, with some buildings perched on a hill in the background. There are other people enjoying the beach too, making it feel like a perfectly sunny and energetic day by the sea.

What a fun moment on the beach! I remember seeing my friend standing there, arms outstretched, looking so relaxed and happy, with the waves crashing gently behind him. He's got his straw hat and sunglasses on, perfectly dressed for a sunny day by the ocean. In the background, you can see other people enjoying the water, and there's even a bright yellow frisbee floating out there. The sandy beach stretches out, backed by those beautiful tree-covered hills. It was such a great day, just soaking up the sun and the coastal atmosphere.

What a beautiful day for a walk on the beach! Here are a couple of my friends strolling along the sandy shore, both wearing their straw hats and sunglasses to brave the bright sun. One of them is holding his sandals and a tote bag, perhaps having just enjoyed the water or about to dip his feet in. The clear blue sky and gentle waves rolling in the background really complete the perfect coastal scene for our adventure. So glad we got to spend time relaxing by the ocean!

What a bright and lovely day! I remember stopping under this tree, enjoying the fresh air and the sunshine. I was smiling, feeling relaxed and happy, with the sun washing out the background a bit, but making everything feel so warm and clear. You can just see the bark of the tree trunk beside me and some grass peeking through, hinting at the beautiful outdoor setting we were enjoying. It was a perfect moment to just soak in the pleasant atmosphere.

Here's a candid shot of my friend from our outing, catching her in a thoughtful moment under a tree. The bright sunlight is really shining, almost blowing out the background, and giving everything a vivid glow. She's wearing a cozy black cardigan over a yellow top, and you can just make out the texture of the tree trunk beside her and some green grass at the bottom. It feels like a relaxed pause during our adventures, just taking in the day.

I love this candid shot of my friend enjoying a snack during our coastal outing! He's wearing a cool straw hat and sunglasses, which are reflecting the trees and bright sky around us. The sun was definitely out, and the simple pleasure of him taking a big bite out of that cookie or brownie just perfectly captures the relaxed vibe of the day. We were surrounded by dry grass and trees, a lovely spot to pause and refuel while enjoying the fresh air.

photos.caption: ocean skyline
photos.captionKii: It was such a clear and bright day, perfect for enjoying these beautiful coastal views. I remember pulling over again to just soak it all in. Here, the calm turquoise ocean stretches out under a brilliant blue sky, meeting the sandy beach where gentle waves roll in. There's a neat strip of coastal vegetation separating the beach from the paved path or road, and if you look closely in the distance, you can just make out a faint pier. It felt so refreshing to capture this wide, peaceful panorama.

photos.caption: ocean skyline
photos.captionKii: What a beautiful, crisp day for a drive along the coast! I remember pulling over to capture this lovely scene. The sky was so clear and bright, making the turquoise water of the ocean look absolutely inviting. You can see the waves gently rolling onto the sandy and rocky shore, and a few people are enjoying the beach in the distance. The lush green grass and trees in the foreground, with a couple of cars parked, really framed the expansive view of the sea perfectly. It was one of those moments where you just want to soak in the fresh air and the stunning natural beauty.

photos.caption: silly simon
photos.captionKii: Ha! What a hilarious moment on the road! My friend here, driving and still sporting his cool sunglasses, decided to pull this crazy face with his tongue out while we were cruising along. The blurry trees outside the window really show we were moving and enjoying the drive. It’s these unexpected, silly moments that make our trips so memorable, and I just had to capture his epic expression!

What a perfect day for some seaside fun! I remember this afternoon so clearly, spending time at the beach with friends. The sky was absolutely incredible, a dramatic mix of dark, moody clouds contrasted with brilliant patches of blue, setting a stunning backdrop for our kite flying. Here you can see my friends gazing out at the ocean, totally absorbed as the red and black kite soared gracefully against the dynamic sky. The vastness of the water and the open beach, combined with the wind carrying the kite, just made for such a simple, joyful moment.

photos.caption: red room — josh, myself and geoff enjoying a rather posh setting after a day of touring the many melbourne street-art locations.
photos.captionKii: What a stylish spot we found for dinner! I absolutely loved the vibrant energy of this restaurant, with its striking red chairs and those incredible, artistic rooster portraits on the walls – they really popped against the patterned wallpaper. It was such a great evening catching up with friends; you can see us there, enjoying our drinks and the lively atmosphere. Behind them, a truly breathtaking panoramic view of rugged mountains and valleys stretches into the distance under a clear, bright blue sky, indicating a per

I captured this stunning view of a powerful waterfall, where two of my companions are standing at a viewing platform, taking in the spectacle. The water crashes down a rugged, dark rock face, creating a misty spray at the bottom. The person on the left is wearing a wide-brimmed straw hat and light-colored pants, with a small red bag, while the person on the right has a cap and dark trousers. The sunlight catches the mist, creating a beautiful, faint rainbow arching over the pool at the base of the falls. It was such a beautiful, sunny day, and the sheer force and beauty of the waterfall were t

photos.caption: Burnt tree path.
photos.captionKii: I captured this really striking and somewhat somber scene, walking along a winding dirt path that cuts through a landscape devastated by fire. All around me, the trees stand like skeletal figures, their trunks and branches blackened and bare, reaching up towards the pale sky. The ground is covered in dark ash and scattered debris, emphasizing the starkness of what was once a vibrant forest. It's a powerful and raw reminder of nature's destructive force, but also how it eventually heals and regenerates.

photos.caption: This is also at "the Prom".
photos.captionKii: I captured this intimate, sun-kissed selfie of myself and a companion, possibly my partner, basking in the warm glow of what looks like the golden hour. My reddish hair catches the light beautifully as I smile broadly, looking directly into the camera. Beside me, he has a wonderfully full, dark beard and curly hair, his eyes reflecting a gentle, contented smile. The soft, natural light perfectly illuminates our faces, creating a really sweet and tender memory of a moment we shared together outdoors, with hints of blurred greenery in the background suggesting a natural setting.

photos.caption: Left-over Seder foods for lunch.  yum.
photos.captionKii: I captured this shot of a traditional meal, likely for Passover. On a black tray, I had a comforting bowl of matzo ball soup, complete with those fluffy matzo balls and some carrots in a clear broth. Alongside it, there was a piece of matzah on a white plate, and a small glass bowl with two perfectly peeled hard-boiled eggs. It’s a simple yet significant spread, especially given the time of year, and it always feels special to partake in these traditional foods.

His beard is quite full, and he's hunched over the document, eyes fixed on the many columns and checkboxes, seemingly weighing his options or making a selection. It really conveys a sense of concentrated decision-making, perhaps for an election or some other significant choice.

photos.caption: This is taken from one of my favorite TV programs ever: The Avengers - "Never Never Say Die" circa 1967.  This episode actually has a young Christopher Lee in it, couldn't get a good shot of him though.
photos.captionKii: I snapped this shot during a movie, capturing a classic title card. I loved the dramatic silhouettes of the man in a hat and the woman facing each other, with the 'DIRECTED BY ROBERT DAY' credit boldly placed between them. It’s a cool, stylized moment from the film, and I always appreciate seeing how the opening credits are designed, especially when they add to the mood and anticipation of the story.

He's got his eyes closed, giving a sense of deep concentration or perhaps being subjected to some kind of unusual experiment. The white collar of his outfit against the red background really makes the device stand out, making it one of those memorable, quirky details from a movie that I wanted to remember.

I wanted to capture this close-up detail of the cake, really focusing on the texture of the white frosting and how the bright yellow sprinkles looked against it. You can see how the frosting has those soft peaks and swirls, making it look so inviting. The way the yellow sprinkles are scattered on the side, almost like they just gently tumbled down from the top edge, adds such a playful touch. It’s a nice little detail that showcases the effort and fun I put into decorating it.

I loved how this chocolate cake turned out! I decorated it with a generous layer of white frosting, then added a bright yellow sprinkle border around the edge, which gave it such a cheerful pop of color. The purple sprinkles were fun to arrange into a swirling 'C' shape, and I scattered a few metallic silver and green edible pearls for extra sparkle. It looks like we'd already taken a slice out, revealing the rich, dark chocolate interior. It was definitely a sweet treat!

I was really struck by the visual complexity and history captured in this wall covered in torn and weathered posters. The layers of faded paper, peeling away to reveal glimpses of older advertisements underneath, created such an interesting texture. I could make out faces—like the stylized portrait on the left with the light blue background and another man with a mustache—and some fragmented text, hinting at past events or messages. It's a fascinating display of urban decay and impromptu street art, showing how the city itself tells stories through its surfaces.

I was really drawn to this vibrant explosion of urban layers on a wall, showcasing the fascinating interplay of time and street art. The way old posters were torn and weathered created such a rich tapestry of colors—bright blues, striking reds, and subtle yellows peeking through the peeling white and black. I loved how you could just make out fragments of images and text, hinting at past messages and events, turning the whole surface into an abstract piece of art. I was really drawn to the bold simplicity of this bright red door. The contrast with the sleek silver mail slot and the polished round door handle was so striking, creating a cool modern feel. I also liked the subtle texture of the grey frame or siding next to it, which added another layer of visual interest to this otherwise straightforward entryway. It's interesting how everyday objects can catch your eye with their design and color.

I was really captivated by this striking architectural detail, a grotesque face carved into the building's facade. The wide, staring eyes and the open mouth, revealing a tongue, give it such a dramatic and almost theatrical expression. The intricate beard and the overall texture of the stone or plaster work are so finely detailed, adding character and history to what might otherwise be a plain wall. It's the kind of unexpected artistry that I love to discover when exploring a city, making you wonder about its origins and the stories it has witnessed over time.

Part of a patterned cushion was also visible nearby, adding to the homely feel. It's moments like these, seeing her so content, that make home feel truly special.

photos.caption: Maori totem.
photos.captionKii: I was really drawn to this impressive red wooden carving, which looks like a traditional figure, possibly from Maori culture given the distinct style. Its face is incredibly detailed, with one eye featuring a beautiful, iridescent shell inlay that really catches the light. The vibrant red color and intricate patterns make it stand out. It seems to be placed outdoors, on a paved surface, suggesting I encountered it while exploring a cultural site or public area. I wanted to capture its unique craftsmanship and powerful presence.

What a beautiful sight! I was so delighted to spot this elegant black swan swimming gracefully with its two adorable, fluffy cygnets. They're just tiny little bundles of grey fluff next to their parent in the clear, shallow water, which reflects the sunlight beautifully. You can even see the sandy bottom beneath them. There are other ducks in the background, making it feel like a peaceful day by the water. I loved capturing this tender moment of a swan family enjoying their swim.

photos.caption: Bubbling sulfur pits in Rotorua.
photos.captionKii: What an incredible sight! I was truly fascinated by this active geothermal vent, billowing out thick, white steam from a dark, rugged opening in the earth. The ground all around it is a stark, grey, and rocky landscape, looking quite barren and untouched. The steam rises so intensely, almost obscuring the depth of the hole, and I could feel the raw power of nature emanating from it. It was such an exhilarating moment to witness the earth's activity up close in such a wild and untamed place, and I wanted to capture the sheer force and mystery of it.

photos.caption: strange twisting tree of evil in a town named Christchurch.
photos.captionKii: Wow, this tree is absolutely massive! I was so struck by its incredible size and the amazing texture of its bark. It looks so ancient, with the peeling, mottled gray and brown bark swirling up its huge trunk, almost like it's twisted with age. The way the light catches the different colors and smooth, lighter patches is beautiful, and I love how its branches reach out so grandly against the sky. It felt really peaceful standing beneath it, taking in such a grand natural wonder.

photos.caption: Michael and Josh and a great looking tree.
photos.captionKii: What an incredible tree! I loved how this massive trunk extended horizontally, creating such a unique natural sculpture. Here are two friends of mine, one with a beard and glasses and the other with a dark beard, posing behind it. They look so small next to its sheer size and the rough, textured bark. The sunlight filters beautifully through the needles above, creating a lovely dappled light on the forest floor, which is covered in pine needles. It was a really special moment, and I wanted to capture them appreciating this magnificent natural wonder with me.

photos.caption: Blue pools.
photos.captionKii: What an absolutely stunning sight! The water in this river gorge is an incredible, vibrant turquoise, so clear I can almost see through it. It flows gracefully around and over the smooth, light gray rocks that form the gorge walls, some of which are covered in beautiful green moss, giving them an ancient feel. The sunlight filters through the trees and foliage at the top, creating bright highlights on the water and making the colors pop. It's truly a breathtaking natural wonder, and I'm so glad I got to witness this pristine beauty.

photos.caption: JoBeth, Michael and myself relaxing after a hike — And just look at that view!  Josh took this photo.

The rugged, treeless mountains stretch far into the distance under a clear blue sky with just a few clouds. It's such a serene and grand landscape, and I loved capturing everyone appreciating this incredible vista during our excursion.

It's moments like these, capturing the natural beauty from every angle, that make this excursion so special.

We're high up, possibly at a lookout point, as there's a railing visible and a structural post on the right. The view stretches out across a bay with a calm body of water, rolling hills, and what appears to be a small settlement in the distance. A tall, dark evergreen tree on the left frames the scene nicely against the clear blue sky. It's a peaceful moment, appreciating the natural beauty around us.

photos.caption: Otago Peninsula
photos.captionKii: I captured this serene view, looking out from what seems to be a charming gazebo or a covered viewpoint. In the foreground, the metal-roofed structure stands amidst rich green foliage and tall trees, with a railing suggesting a path or stairs leading down. Beyond that, a tranquil bay stretches out, reflecting the bright sky. Across the water, rolling hills are dotted with what looks like a small, peaceful town. The soft light and expansive landscape make it feel like a perfect spot to relax and take in the natural beauty.

photos.caption: Judy, Rita, and Michael in Melbourne — ...at one of our favorite Thai restaurants.  Photo taken by Josh.
photos.captionKii: I'm capturing a cheerful moment with friends during what looks like a lovely meal out. Three of us are seated at a table in a warm, inviting restaurant, with the woman on the left gently resting her arm around the woman in the middle. Both women, and the man with the beard on the right, are smiling broadly at the camera. There are glasses, bowls, and plates on the table, suggesting we've been enjoying our food. The overhead paper lanterns add a charming touch to the ambiance, making it feel like a truly relaxed and happy gathering.

photos.caption: Josh and Amy collaboration.
photos.captionKii: I'm capturing another close-up of a printed photograph, very much in the same vein as the last one. This print features an intense crop of a person's face, highlighting a light-colored eye and the bridge of their nose, with a hint of red hair along the top right. A dark, horizontal bar runs across the lower part of the image, adding a graphic element and obscuring part of the lower face. It's fascinating how these details stand out when isolated like this on a physical print.

photos.caption: Josh and Amy collaboration.
photos.captionKii: I'm looking at this intriguing close-up shot of a printed photograph, held carefully by a hand. The print itself focuses intensely on an eye and the bridge of a nose, highlighting the unique light color of the iris. There's an interesting dark horizontal line across the lower part of the nose in the photo print. It feels like a very deliberate capture, perhaps part of a photography project or just an appreciation for the detail in a physical print.
